## Automated Tests Required

### S02-02: CI Pipeline Verification — Infrastructure

**Test file path**: Existing test suite execution via `.github/workflows/tests.yml`
**What to test**:
- All existing unit tests pass on CI runner (Godot 4.6.2)
- All existing integration tests pass on CI runner
- CI workflow completes without timeout or environment errors

**Verification steps**:
1. Push to main or trigger workflow manually
2. Confirm Godot 4.6.2 runner starts successfully
3. Confirm GDUnit4 discovers and runs all tests in `tests/unit/` and `tests/integration/`
4. Confirm 24+ tests pass (20 unit + 3 integration + 1 runner)
5. Confirm test report artifact is uploaded

**Edge cases**:
- Runner may not have Godot 4.6.2 cached — budget extra time for first-run install
- GDUnit4 addon path may differ on CI vs local — verify `addons/gdunit4/` is committed

**Estimated test count**: N/A (verification of existing 24+ tests)

---

### S02-04: Jolt Web Export Verification — Infrastructure

**Test file path**: Manual test — `production/qa/evidence/s02-04-jolt-web-evidence.md`
**What to test**:
- Web export builds successfully from Godot 4.6.2
- Jolt physics engine is active in the exported build (not Godot default)
- Floor collision: object rests on static floor without falling through
- Wall collision: object bounces off static wall correctly
- Dynamic body collision: two objects collide and respond with correct momentum

**Edge cases**:
- Export template missing — verify HTML5 export template installed for 4.6.2
- Jolt not default on Web — verify project settings use Jolt, not Godot Physics
- COOP/COEP headers required for SharedArrayBuffer — test on local server with correct headers

**Estimated test count**: 3 collision scenarios + 1 build verification

---

### S02-07: Tuning Metrics Instrumentation — Logic

**Test file path**: `tests/unit/analytics-system/metrics_test.gd` (to be created)
**What to test**:
- `combo_length` event fires with correct integer value when combo ends
- `trigger_rate` event fires with correct float value (combos per minute)
- `dead_zone_frequency` event fires with correct integer count per session
- Events include required metadata: timestamp, session_id, platform
- Events do NOT fire during intermission or pause states

**Edge cases**:
- Zero-length combo (single hit, no combo): event fires with value 1
- Session with zero combos: no `trigger_rate` event fires (no division by zero)
- Rapid combo chains: events queue without data loss
- Web platform: events log to console (no server endpoint yet)

**Estimated test count**: ~8 unit tests

---

### S02-05: Accessibility Basic Tier — UI/Integration

**Test file path**: `tests/unit/accessibility/remapping_test.gd` (to be created)
**What to test**:
- Input remapping: player can rebind any action to any key/gamepad button
- Remapped input persists across session (saved to user config)
- Subtitle system: subtitles display when dialogue/cues play
- Subtitles scale correctly at 1280x720, 1920x1080, 2560x1440
- Subtitle text is readable (minimum 16px at 1080p equivalent)

**Edge cases**:
- Conflicting remap (two actions bound to same key): last-write-wins or warning
- Remap during gameplay: new binding takes effect immediately without restart
- Subtitle overflow: long text wraps or truncates within subtitle box
- No subtitle font loaded: fallback to engine default font

**Estimated test count**: ~6 unit tests (remapping logic) + manual subtitle verification

---

## Manual QA Checklist

### S02-01: Ink-Wash Shader Prototype — Visual/Feel

**Verification method**: Playtest session + FPS counter + screenshot
**Who must sign off**: art-director + technical-artist
**Evidence to capture**: 3 screenshots showing ink-wash effect, FPS overlay visible

Checklist:
- [ ] Prototype runs at ≥50fps on WebGL target (Chrome, Firefox)
- [ ] Ink-wash effect is visually distinct from default unlit shading
- [ ] Effect visible in 3 test scenes: flat surface, character mesh, environment geometry
- [ ] Shader compiles without WebGL 2.0 errors
- [ ] Draw call count does not exceed budget (<50/frame) with effect active
- [ ] Shader uses Godot Shader Language only (.gdshader), no GDExtension

---

### S02-03: Performance Baseline Report — Analysis

**Verification method**: Profiling session with Godot debugger + Web inspector
**Who must sign off**: technical-director
**Evidence to capture**: Written report at `production/qa/perf-baseline-sprint-02.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] Frame time measured for 3 enemy count (idle, combat, peak)
- [ ] Frame time measured for 5 enemy count (idle, combat, peak)
- [ ] Frame time measured for 10 enemy count (idle, combat, peak)
- [ ] Draw calls recorded per scenario
- [ ] Memory usage recorded per scenario
- [ ] All measurements taken on WebGL target (Chrome)
- [ ] Results compared against performance budgets (16.6ms frame, <50 draw calls)
- [ ] Report identifies top 3 bottlenecks if any scenario exceeds budget

---

### S02-06: Asset Deliverable Manifest — Config/Data

**Verification method**: Manual review of generated manifest
**Who must sign off**: art-director
**Evidence to capture**: Manifest file at `production/asset-manifest.md` or equivalent

Checklist:
- [ ] All GDD-referenced assets have corresponding entries in manifest
- [ ] Each entry includes: asset name, GDD reference, file path on disk (or "NOT YET CREATED")
- [ ] Missing assets are clearly flagged
- [ ] Manifest covers all 10+ GDDs that reference assets
- [ ] Format is machine-parseable (YAML, JSON, or structured Markdown table)

---

### S02-08: Create shader-rendering stories — Story Creation

**Verification method**: Story file review
**Who must sign off**: lead-programmer
**Evidence to capture**: Story files at `production/epics/shader-rendering/story-*.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] ≥3 stories created covering shader-rendering GDD requirements
- [ ] Each story follows project story format (Context, AC, Implementation Notes, Test Evidence)
- [ ] Each story references governing ADR (ADR-0003)
- [ ] Each story has TR-ID from tr-registry.yaml
- [ ] Stories are ordered: foundation behavior first, edge cases last
- [ ] Story types classified (Logic / Visual/Feel / Config/Data)

---

### S02-09: Create audio-system stories — Story Creation

**Verification method**: Story file review
**Who must sign off**: lead-programmer
**Evidence to capture**: Story files at `production/epics/audio-system/story-*.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] ≥3 stories created covering audio-system GDD requirements
- [ ] Each story follows project story format
- [ ] Each story references governing ADR (ADR-0004)
- [ ] Each story has TR-ID from tr-registry.yaml
- [ ] Stories ordered: audio bus setup → SFX playback → BGM streaming
- [ ] Story types classified

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before QA hand-off for Sprint 02:

1. Game launches to main menu without crash (existing — regression check)
2. All existing unit tests pass (24+ tests — CI green)
3. Web export builds and runs without Jolt errors
4. Input remapping functional (new S02-05 feature)
5. Performance within budget on WebGL (S02-03 baseline)
6. No new draw call spikes from shader prototype (S02-01)

---

## Playtest Requirements

| Task | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player Type |
|------|--------------|--------------|-------------------|
| S02-01 Shader | Does ink-wash effect enhance visual identity without performance penalty? | 1 | Internal (art-director) |
| S02-05 Accessibility | Can a new player remap controls and read subtitles without guidance? | 1 | New player |

**Sign-off requirement**: Playtest notes written to `production/session-logs/playtest-sprint-02-[slug].md` and reviewed by qa-lead.

---

## Definition of Done — This Sprint

A task is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] Acceptance criteria from `production/sprints/sprint-02.md` verified
- [ ] Manual evidence captured (screenshot, report, or playtest notes) where required
- [ ] Automated tests pass for S02-02 (CI), S02-07 (metrics), S02-05 (accessibility)
- [ ] Story files created and follow project format for S02-08, S02-09
- [ ] Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off)
- [ ] No regressions introduced to existing 24+ test suite
- [ ] Task status updated in `production/sprint-status.yaml`
